name: Cream Cheese-Deviled Ham Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, deviled ham, and dry red wine until creamy.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients: finely chopped dill pickle, instant minced onion, Worcestershire sauce, instant minced garlic, and dry mustard.
3. Serve immediately as a dip or refrigerate to serve as a spread.
